## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature / adapter
- [ ] Breaking change (affects existing artifact parsing or release decisions)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / tooling

-

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior
- [ ] Fixture-based tests added for new adapters
- [ ] Tested with real or synthetic artifact samples

## Safety Considerations

For changes affecting core pipeline, artifact parsing, or release decisions:

- [ ] Determinism confirmed — same input always produces same output
- [ ] Conservative behavior confirmed — ambiguous cases flag rather than approve
- [ ] No silent data modification of input artifacts
